premise: I emptied my $180,000 retirement account to launch a veterinary hospital for my daughter and son-in-law, trusting their promise of 30% equity, but they secretly reincorporated under a new name, stripped the assets, and filed bankruptcy, leaving me penniless while they reopened an identical clinic two towns over. I tracked the bankruptcy fraud, bought their equipment debt from the bank for $12,000, foreclosed on the new location, and reopened it as a low-cost spay-and-neuter clinic that poached their entire client list within six months.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Daughter Took My $180K, Bankrupted Me, And Reopened. So I Foreclosed On Her C
